args.text: Billing API v3.4.1 deployed and double_charge_guard confirmed live.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued

Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body:
Three refunds have been issued for the duplicate-charge incident on 12 May:

- ORD-5501: $19.99 to amara.osei@fernpost.example
- ORD-5502: $19.99 to jonas.beck@quillmail.example
- ORD-5503: $39.98 to priya.nair@lumenpost.example

Total refunded: $79.96

The root cause (disabled double-charge guard) has been remediated and billing-api v3.4.1 is now live.
